title: Cheerfulness In Charity; Or, The Sweet Sacrifice.
content:
'Tis not a thousand bullocks' thighs
    Can please those heav'nly deities,
    If the vower don't express
    In his offering cheerfulness.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Cheerfulness In Charity; Or, The Sweet Sacrifice.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
